text:
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow Jeeves — Daily Pipeline failed.
- [escalation] GitClear: GitClear notification that a team sync request failed due to blank team list.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow Jeeves — Research Phase failed in jeeves-memory repo.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow Jeeves — Research Phase was cancelled in jeeves-unchained repo.
- [escalation] Google: Google security alert that Opal was granted access to Google Account data.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow Jeeves — Research Phase failed in jeeves-unchained repo.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow for Jeeves Research Phase failed on main branch.
- [escalation] Google: Google security alert about Claude for Google Drive access to the account.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow for Jeeves-Unchained Research Phase failed on main branch.
- [escalation] "Tithe.ly": Tithe.ly automated giving failed for $5.46 to The Practicing Church.
- [reply needed] MARK M McDermott: Mark McDermott checks in, asks about permanent teaching position and suggests getting together.
- [reply needed] Dean Ferguson: Dean Ferguson sent a request for a letter of recommendation.
